Video.summary: While Tony investigates the murder of a local drug and weapons dealer, Rachel is taken hostage.
Video.title: Romeo And Juliet

Video.summary: Tony is asked to keep a young girl from being returned to her sexually abusive father.
Video.title: The Letter Of The Law

Video.summary: Tony runs up against an overzealous security guard; Rachel's father turns to Tony for help in a business deal.
Video.title: Security

Video.summary: In an effort make sergeant, Stan enlists an abused wife to catch her suspected drug dealer husband.
Video.title: Sergeant Kelly

Video.summary: A prominent doctor kills an officer's wife while driving drunk.
Video.title: Dead Drunk

Video.summary: When a beautiful, young Mafia wife is framed for the murder of her husband, she fears for her life, knowing that his mob boss father will stop at nothing to revenge his son's death.
Video.title: The Rabbit And The Fox

Video.summary: When Reno tracks down assault and battery suspect Jason Calhoun, the head of a gang of surfers, he is immediately enthralled by the young man's charisma but soon thereafter uncovers evidence of Calhoun's involvement in a much larger operation
Video.title: Endless Summer

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby learn to never underestimate the power of a woman when they encounter a beautiful, young bail jumper, wanted in San Diego for assaulting an officer and resisting arrest.
Video.title: Bonnie And Claire

Video.summary: After tailing robber Nicky Griffin for two years, Bobby and Cheyenne are able to link the man and his proficient get-away drivers to the stock car racing circuit through his most recent heist of a local bank
Video.title: Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche

Image.alt: Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche
Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche
Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche

Video.summary: When Reno learns of the escape of a convicted killer, he heads for Chicago to protect the arresting officer, his father, Police Sergeant Doug Raines
Video.title: Windy City Blues

Video.summary: When a distinguished municipal judge awakes after an intimate evening to find his "date" murdered during the night, he must pay the price to the club owner who is willing to help him cover up the incident.
Video.title: Honor Bound

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the murder of an up-and-coming young tennis champ's stepfather.
Video.title: Love-15

Video.summary: Chris poses as a beauty pageant judge to find out who brutally murdered the pageant's most recent queen.
Video.title: The Queen Is Dead

Video.summary: The murder of a wealthy woman points toward her estranged husband.
Video.title: Irreconcilable Differences

Video.summary: The death of another female cop has a deep psychological effect on Rita.
Video.title: Jasmine

Video.summary: When one of the young men on the basketball team Chris coaches is found murdered, Chris and Rita investigate.
Video.title: Crush

Video.summary: Chris and Rita discover that a deranged woman planning to kill her lover is part of an elaborate scheme.
Video.title: Was It Good For You Too?

Image.alt: Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?

Video.summary: The murder of a wealthy Guatemalan businessman takes on serious international implications.
Video.title: Scorpio Lover

Video.summary: Reno's latest job gets personal - the bounty is on the head of Earl Lyons, an ex-Army Ranger from Reno's unit.
Video.title: Lyon's Roar

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy investigate a series of murders that appear to be the work of a vampire.
Video.title: I Love The Nightlife

Video.summary: The death of a military academy's only female cadet appears to be murder.
Video.title: The Rock

Video.summary: Tom questions the story of a woman whose husband was murdered by a gang of art thieves.
Video.title: Pretty In Black

Video.summary: A voodoo priest whose spell has driven an acolyte to murder now threatens Cassy.
Video.title: Silent Witness

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy's investigation of an FBI agent's murder is hampered by a pair of secretive and uncooperative federal agents.
Video.title: Ladies Man

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy investigate the death of a prep school student whose blackmail scheme led to his murder.
Video.title: Dirty Little Secret

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy disagree over a psychic who claims to have knowledge of a murder.
Video.title: A Question of Faith

Video.summary: Reno falls into a deadly trap when false news reports claim that Valerie Prentice, his comatose fiancee, has awakened.
Video.title: Val's Song
